LAW AND MOTION 503, WRIT OF MANDATE. APPEARANCES BY BOTH SIDES. HAVING HEARD ORAL ARGUMENTS, THE COURT ORDERED THE ALTERNATIVE WRIT STAND UNTIL JULY 31, 2003 AT WHICH TIME A STATUS CONFERENCE WILL BE HELD ON JULY 31, 2003 AT 3:30 P.M. IN DEPT. 503. THE COURT ORDERED THAT NOTICE IS TO BE GIVEN BY MR.
